message:
refactor(model): extract shared attention block and update forward functions

Phase 1: Create model/ module with shared attention block
- Add AttentionBlockParams struct for encapsulated attention state
- Add AttentionEngine vtable interface for Metal engine decoupling
- Add encodeAttentionBlock() implementing 8-step attention pattern
- Add buildParams() helper to reduce boilerplate

Phase 1B: Update GPU forward functions to use shared attention
- forwardSingleSubmit: Use shared attention block
- forwardSpeculative: Use shared attention block
- forwardDraft: Use shared attention (removed redundant FFN RMSNorm)
- forwardTokenBatch: Use shared attention block
- forwardBatchTokens: Use shared attention block
- forwardBatchedLayerByLayer: Skipped (complex debug code)

Benefits:
- ~90 lines reduced across 5 functions
- All functions now use encodeDenseAuto for Q2K model support
- Consistent attention behavior across all GPU paths

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,233 @@
+//! Shared Attention Block
+//!
+//! Implements the 8-step attention pattern used across all forward variants:
+//! 1. RMSNorm (residual -> normed)
+//! 2. Q/K/V Dense Projections (auto-dispatch by quant type)
+//! 3. RoPE on Q and K
+//! 4. KV Cache Update
+//! 5. GQA Scores
+//! 6. GQA Softmax + Output
+//! 7. O Projection
+//! 8. Residual Add
+//!
+//! This module eliminates ~40% code duplication across 9 forward functions.
+
+const std = @import("std");
+const objc = @import("../inference/metal/objc.zig");
+const gguf_types = @import("../inference/gguf/types.zig");
+const moe_types = @import("../moe/types.zig");
+
+pub const GGMLType = gguf_types.GGMLType;
+pub const ResidentLayerWeights = moe_types.ResidentLayerWeights;
+
+/// Parameters for encoding a complete attention block
+pub const AttentionBlockParams = struct {
+    // Layer info
+    layer_idx: u32,
+    pos: u32,
+    seq_len: u32,
+
+    // Model dimensions
+    n_embd: u32,
+    n_head: u32,
+    n_head_kv: u32,
+    head_dim: u32,
+    kv_dim: u32,
+    rope_theta: f32,
+    rms_norm_eps: f32,
+
+    // GPU buffers (working memory)
+    buf_residual: objc.MTLBuffer,
+    buf_normed: objc.MTLBuffer,
+    buf_q: objc.MTLBuffer,
+    buf_k: objc.MTLBuffer,
+    buf_v: objc.MTLBuffer,
+    buf_attn_out: objc.MTLBuffer,
+    buf_hidden_states: objc.MTLBuffer,
+    buf_gqa_scores: objc.MTLBuffer,
+
+    // KV cache for this layer
+    kv_cache_k: objc.MTLBuffer,
+    kv_cache_v: objc.MTLBuffer,
+
+    // Layer weights with quantization types
+    attn_norm: objc.MTLBuffer,
+    attn_q: objc.MTLBuffer,
+    attn_k: objc.MTLBuffer,
+    attn_v: objc.MTLBuffer,
+    attn_o: objc.MTLBuffer,
+    attn_q_type: GGMLType,
+    attn_k_type: GGMLType,
+    attn_v_type: GGMLType,
+    attn_o_type: GGMLType,
+};
+
+/// Interface for the Metal engine operations needed by attention block
+/// This allows decoupling from the concrete MetalMoEEngine type
+pub const AttentionEngine = struct {
+    ptr: *anyopaque,
+    vtable: *const VTable,
+
+    pub const VTable = struct {
+        encodeRmsNorm: *const fn (ptr: *anyopaque, cmd_buf: objc.MTLCommandBuffer, input: objc.MTLBuffer, weights: objc.MTLBuffer, output: objc.MTLBuffer, n: u32, eps: f32) anyerror!void,
+        encodeDenseAuto: *const fn (ptr: *anyopaque, cmd_buf: objc.MTLCommandBuffer, weights: objc.MTLBuffer, input: objc.MTLBuffer, output: objc.MTLBuffer, n_out: u32, n_in: u32, weight_type: GGMLType) anyerror!void,
+        encodeRope: *const fn (ptr: *anyopaque, cmd_buf: objc.MTLCommandBuffer, buf: objc.MTLBuffer, head_dim: u32, n_head: u32, rope_theta: f32, pos: u32) anyerror!void,
+        encodeKVCacheUpdate: *const fn (ptr: *anyopaque, cmd_buf: objc.MTLCommandBuffer, k: objc.MTLBuffer, v: objc.MTLBuffer, cache_k: objc.MTLBuffer, cache_v: objc.MTLBuffer, kv_dim: u32, pos: u32) anyerror!void,
+        encodeGQAScores: *const fn (ptr: *anyopaque, cmd_buf: objc.MTLCommandBuffer, q: objc.MTLBuffer, k_cache: objc.MTLBuffer, scores: objc.MTLBuffer, n_head: u32, n_head_kv: u32, head_dim: u32, seq_len: u32) anyerror!void,
+        encodeGQASoftmax: *const fn (ptr: *anyopaque, cmd_buf: objc.MTLCommandBuffer, scores: objc.MTLBuffer, n_head: u32, seq_len: u32) anyerror!void,
+        encodeGQAOutput: *const fn (ptr: *anyopaque, cmd_buf: objc.MTLCommandBuffer, v_cache: objc.MTLBuffer, scores: objc.MTLBuffer, output: objc.MTLBuffer, n_head: u32, n_head_kv: u32, head_dim: u32, seq_len: u32) anyerror!void,
+        encodeAdd: *const fn (ptr: *anyopaque, cmd_buf: objc.MTLCommandBuffer, a: objc.MTLBuffer, b: objc.MTLBuffer, out: objc.MTLBuffer, n: u32) anyerror!void,
+    };
+
+    pub fn encodeRmsNorm(self: AttentionEngine, cmd_buf: objc.MTLCommandBuffer, input: objc.MTLBuffer, weights: objc.MTLBuffer, output: objc.MTLBuffer, n: u32, eps: f32) !void {
+        return self.vtable.encodeRmsNorm(self.ptr, cmd_buf, input, weights, output, n, eps);
+    }
+
+    pub fn encodeDenseAuto(self: AttentionEngine, cmd_buf: objc.MTLCommandBuffer, weights: objc.MTLBuffer, input: objc.MTLBuffer, output: objc.MTLBuffer, n_out: u32, n_in: u32, weight_type: GGMLType) !void {
+        return self.vtable.encodeDenseAuto(self.ptr, cmd_buf, weights, input, output, n_out, n_in, weight_type);
+    }
+
+    pub fn encodeRope(self: AttentionEngine, cmd_buf: objc.MTLCommandBuffer, buf: objc.MTLBuffer, head_dim: u32, n_head: u32, rope_theta: f32, pos: u32) !void {
+        return self.vtable.encodeRope(self.ptr, cmd_buf, buf, head_dim, n_head, rope_theta, pos);
+    }
+
+    pub fn encodeKVCacheUpdate(self: AttentionEngine, cmd_buf: objc.MTLCommandBuffer, k: objc.MTLBuffer, v: objc.MTLBuffer, cache_k: objc.MTLBuffer, cache_v: objc.MTLBuffer, kv_dim: u32, pos: u32) !void {
+        return self.vtable.encodeKVCacheUpdate(self.ptr, cmd_buf, k, v, cache_k, cache_v, kv_dim, pos);
+    }
+
+    pub fn encodeGQAScores(self: AttentionEngine, cmd_buf: objc.MTLCommandBuffer, q: objc.MTLBuffer, k_cache: objc.MTLBuffer, scores: objc.MTLBuffer, n_head: u32, n_head_kv: u32, head_dim: u32, seq_len: u32) !void {
+        return self.vtable.encodeGQAScores(self.ptr, cmd_buf, q, k_cache, scores, n_head, n_head_kv, head_dim, seq_len);
+    }
+
+    pub fn encodeGQASoftmax(self: AttentionEngine, cmd_buf: objc.MTLCommandBuffer, scores: objc.MTLBuffer, n_head: u32, seq_len: u32) !void {
+        return self.vtable.encodeGQASoftmax(self.ptr, cmd_buf, scores, n_head, seq_len);
+    }
+
+    pub fn encodeGQAOutput(self: AttentionEngine, cmd_buf: objc.MTLCommandBuffer, v_cache: objc.MTLBuffer, scores: objc.MTLBuffer, output: objc.MTLBuffer, n_head: u32, n_head_kv: u32, head_dim: u32, seq_len: u32) !void {
+        return self.vtable.encodeGQAOutput(self.ptr, cmd_buf, v_cache, scores, output, n_head, n_head_kv, head_dim, seq_len);
+    }
+
+    pub fn encodeAdd(self: AttentionEngine, cmd_buf: objc.MTLCommandBuffer, a: objc.MTLBuffer, b: objc.MTLBuffer, out: objc.MTLBuffer, n: u32) !void {
+        return self.vtable.encodeAdd(self.ptr, cmd_buf, a, b, out, n);
+    }
+};
+
+/// Encode a complete attention block (steps 1-8)
+///
+/// This encodes all attention operations into the command buffer without
+/// committing. The caller is responsible for commit/wait.
+///
+/// After this call:
+/// - buf_residual contains: residual + attention_output
+/// - buf_normed contains: RMSNorm(residual) ready for FFN/MoE
+pub fn encodeAttentionBlock(
+    engine: AttentionEngine,
+    cmd_buf: objc.MTLCommandBuffer,
+    params: AttentionBlockParams,
+    ffn_norm: objc.MTLBuffer,
+) !void {
+    // ==================== ATTENTION BLOCK ====================
+
+    // A. RMSNorm (buf_residual -> buf_normed)
+    try engine.encodeRmsNorm(
+        cmd_buf,
+        params.buf_residual,
+        params.attn_norm,
+        params.buf_normed,
+        params.n_embd,
+        params.rms_norm_eps,
+    );
+
+    // B. Q/K/V Dense Projections (auto-dispatch based on tensor type)
+    try engine.encodeDenseAuto(cmd_buf, params.attn_q, params.buf_normed, params.buf_q, params.n_embd, params.n_embd, params.attn_q_type);
+    try engine.encodeDenseAuto(cmd_buf, params.attn_k, params.buf_normed, params.buf_k, params.kv_dim, params.n_embd, params.attn_k_type);
+    try engine.encodeDenseAuto(cmd_buf, params.attn_v, params.buf_normed, params.buf_v, params.kv_dim, params.n_embd, params.attn_v_type);
+
+    // C. RoPE on Q and K
+    try engine.encodeRope(cmd_buf, params.buf_q, params.head_dim, params.n_head, params.rope_theta, params.pos);
+    try engine.encodeRope(cmd_buf, params.buf_k, params.head_dim, params.n_head_kv, params.rope_theta, params.pos);
+
+    // D. Update KV Cache
+    try engine.encodeKVCacheUpdate(cmd_buf, params.buf_k, params.buf_v, params.kv_cache_k, params.kv_cache_v, params.kv_dim, params.pos);
+
+    // E. GQA Multi-Head Attention
+    try engine.encodeGQAScores(cmd_buf, params.buf_q, params.kv_cache_k, params.buf_gqa_scores, params.n_head, params.n_head_kv, params.head_dim, params.seq_len);
+
+    // F. Softmax and Output
+    try engine.encodeGQASoftmax(cmd_buf, params.buf_gqa_scores, params.n_head, params.seq_len);
+    try engine.encodeGQAOutput(cmd_buf, params.kv_cache_v, params.buf_gqa_scores, params.buf_attn_out, params.n_head, params.n_head_kv, params.head_dim, params.seq_len);
+
+    // G. O Projection (auto-dispatch based on tensor type)
+    try engine.encodeDenseAuto(cmd_buf, params.attn_o, params.buf_attn_out, params.buf_hidden_states, params.n_embd, params.n_embd, params.attn_o_type);
+
+    // H. Attention residual add
+    try engine.encodeAdd(cmd_buf, params.buf_residual, params.buf_hidden_states, params.buf_residual, params.n_embd);
+
+    // I. FFN/MoE RMSNorm (prepare buf_normed for next stage)
+    try engine.encodeRmsNorm(
+        cmd_buf,
+        params.buf_residual,
+        ffn_norm,
+        params.buf_normed,
+        params.n_embd,
+        params.rms_norm_eps,
+    );
+}
+
+/// Build AttentionBlockParams from ResidentLayerWeights and engine buffers
+/// This is a convenience function to reduce boilerplate in forward functions
+pub fn buildParams(
+    layer_weights: ResidentLayerWeights,
+    layer_idx: u32,
+    pos: u32,
+    seq_len: u32,
+    n_embd: u32,
+    n_head: u32,
+    n_head_kv: u32,
+    head_dim: u32,
+    rope_theta: f32,
+    rms_norm_eps: f32,
+    buf_residual: objc.MTLBuffer,
+    buf_normed: objc.MTLBuffer,
+    buf_q: objc.MTLBuffer,
+    buf_k: objc.MTLBuffer,
+    buf_v: objc.MTLBuffer,
+    buf_attn_out: objc.MTLBuffer,
+    buf_hidden_states: objc.MTLBuffer,
+    buf_gqa_scores: objc.MTLBuffer,
+    kv_cache_k: objc.MTLBuffer,
+    kv_cache_v: objc.MTLBuffer,
+) AttentionBlockParams {
+    const kv_dim = n_head_kv * head_dim;
+    return AttentionBlockParams{
+        .layer_idx = layer_idx,
+        .pos = pos,
+        .seq_len = seq_len,
+        .n_embd = n_embd,
+        .n_head = n_head,
+        .n_head_kv = n_head_kv,
+        .head_dim = head_dim,
+        .kv_dim = kv_dim,
+        .rope_theta = rope_theta,
+        .rms_norm_eps = rms_norm_eps,
+        .buf_residual = buf_residual,
+        .buf_normed = buf_normed,
+        .buf_q = buf_q,
+        .buf_k = buf_k,
+        .buf_v = buf_v,
+        .buf_attn_out = buf_attn_out,
+        .buf_hidden_states = buf_hidden_states,
+        .buf_gqa_scores = buf_gqa_scores,
+        .kv_cache_k = kv_cache_k,
+        .kv_cache_v = kv_cache_v,
+        .attn_norm = layer_weights.attn_norm.?,
+        .attn_q = layer_weights.attn_q.?,
+        .attn_k = layer_weights.attn_k.?,
+        .attn_v = layer_weights.attn_v.?,
+        .attn_o = layer_weights.attn_o.?,
+        .attn_q_type = layer_weights.attn_q_type,
+        .attn_k_type = layer_weights.attn_k_type,
+        .attn_v_type = layer_weights.attn_v_type,
+        .attn_o_type = layer_weights.attn_o_type,
+    };
+}

@@ -0,0 +1,16 @@
+//! Model building blocks
+//!
+//! Shared components for transformer models (Mixtral, Qwen, Llama, etc.)
+//!
+//! Modules:
+//! - attention_block: Shared 8-step attention pattern
+//! - moe_block: (TODO) Shared MoE expert dispatch
+//! - config: (TODO) Model configuration tagged union
+
+pub const attention_block = @import("attention_block.zig");
+
+// Re-exports for convenience
+pub const AttentionBlockParams = attention_block.AttentionBlockParams;
+pub const AttentionEngine = attention_block.AttentionEngine;
+pub const encodeAttentionBlock = attention_block.encodeAttentionBlock;
+pub const buildAttentionParams = attention_block.buildParams;
